title: Stored web push endpoint can drive service-role reminder cron SSRF

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: endpoint is arbitrary text with no scheme/host allowlist or push-service constraint

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: owner_all RLS lets an authenticated user write their own subscription rows

affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: service-role cron selects all stored endpoints

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: stored endpoint is placed in pushSub and passed to webPush.sendNotification

title: Direct support-email invocation bypasses feedback length/rating limits before Resend send

affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: documented callable Edge Function for app feedback email

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: function trims message and checks only non-empty, without server-side max length, rating range, or rate limit

affected_locations.label: closest_control
affected_locations.detail: client-side feedback validation limits message to 2000 chars and rating 1-5, but it is not enforced by the email function

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: unbounded message is sent to Resend email API

title: Habit routine AI endpoint forwards unbounded answers object to Gemini

affected_locations.label: entrypoint/wrapper
affected_locations.detail: client invokes habit-routine with answers and localRecommendations

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: localRecommendations are sanitized and bounded, but answers has no equivalent sanitizer

affected_locations.label: closest_control
affected_locations.detail: Pro access and per-call AI quota are enforced before the model call

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: body.answers is embedded in the Gemini prompt payload

title: Unbounded web push subscriptions can amplify scheduled push worker fanout

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: subscription table has unique endpoint but no per-user row limit or endpoint format constraint

affected_locations.label: root_control
affected_locations.detail: owner_all RLS permits authenticated users to manage all of their subscription rows

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: reminder worker selects all subscriptions and sends/logs per due subscription

affected_locations.label: sink
affected_locations.detail: coach-push groups all subscriptions by user and sends to every endpoint for that user
